title: eriogonum ochrocephalum
intro: Eriogonum ochrocephalum, also known as Desert King, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the Buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eriogonum ochrocephalum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Eriogonum ochrocephalum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
